burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to disability and caregiver burden
burden.mortalityRate: Moderate (driven by comorbidity and stroke risk)

vulnerablePopulations: patients with uncontrolled vascular risk factors
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Cognitive decline with vascular events or imaging evidence; neuroimaging supports diagnosis

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: opportunistic cognitive screening in primary care
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; prevention depends on vascular risk control

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical assessment with MRI/CT widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Vascular risk factor control, antiplatelet therapy when indicated, cognitive rehabilitation and caregiver support
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Care coordination and long-term support services
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong stroke prevention programs and dementia care pathways
